title: Machine Coding Round 2
subtitle: 120-minute Week 2 review — product listing, search, filter, pagination, and cart
prerequisites: day08 — fetch, loading/error/empty states, API interfaces
day09 — debouncing, custom hooks, paginated search
day11 — infinite scroll, event loop, Intersection Observer
day12 — Context API, useReducer, cart immutability
day13 — dynamic routes, URL params, navigation
expectedOutcome: Build product listing with search, filter, pagination, and cart in 120 minutes without copying old code
Demonstrate Week 2 concepts under interview time pressure
Explain architectural decisions: hooks, Context, routing, performance
Identify personal weak areas before Week 3
definitionOfDone: Timed 120-minute build completed under exam conditions
Product listing with category/price filter and sort
Pagination or infinite scroll for products
Shopping cart with add, remove, quantity, and total via Context
No AI, no Google — official docs only during build
Self-review notes listing weak Week 2 topics
Git push of machine coding attempt

tomorrowPreview.title: Theme Management
tomorrowPreview.summary: Week 3 begins with advanced React patterns — tomorrow you will build theme switching with Context, preparing for Redux Toolkit and authentication flows.
